name: boundary_calibration
description: Use faster hardware to explore slightly richer boundary-conditioned fusion without drifting into heavy new branches.
prompt_extra: Build on the current best boundary-supervision baseline. Make exactly one focused change in train.py. Target only boundary-head usage, boundary-conditioned feature fusion, or boundary loss calibration. On this stronger hardware you may allow a modestly richer fusion block if it stays localized and keeps the code simple. Avoid broad optimizer rewrites or major architecture overhauls.
